name: Shirred Eggs (Baked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter the bottoms of 6 muffin cups in a large muffin tin.
3. Cook bacon until most of the fat is rendered out, but it remains limp. Place one slice into each buttered muffin cup, curling around so that the bottom is completely covered.
4. Crack one egg into each muffin cup. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Dot with a small amount of butter.
6. Add 1 tablespoon Dry Sherry and 1 tablespoon Light Cream to each muffin cup.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes, or until the eggs reach the desired level of doneness.
8. Serve on halves of toasted English Muffins.
